subject: Fermi GBM trigger 140913075 is not a GRB
body:
V. Pelassa (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 432265650 / 140913075
at 01:47:27.42 UT on 13 September 2014, tentatively classified as a burst
from SGR1806n20 or as a GRB (2nd most likely), is in fact due to neither
of these. This trigger is due to local particles."
